mechanism_narrative: The federal funds rate at the zero lower bound implies perpetually low discount rates for equity cash flows, which supports elevated valuations and positive forward returns over 60 trading days in a sluggish but recovering economy.
failure_condition: If the 60-day forward return is negative more than 40% of the time when FEDFUNDS ≤ 0.25% over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate persistently above 8% signals deep labor market slack that depresses aggregate demand and earnings growth, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If the average 20-day forward return is positive when triggered, or if the condition is active less than 10% of trading days.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE is above 8%, monthly increases in PAYEMS are interpreted as a disappointment because they are insufficient to reduce slack, leading to negative forward returns; when UNRATE is below 8%, payroll gains are rewarded positively.
failure_condition: If in the high UNRATE regime, positive PAYEMS surprises are followed by positive returns in more than 45% of cases over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales (RSAFS) and housing starts (HOUST) above their respective 12-month moving averages signal robust demand momentum and an expanding consumer sector, which lifts forward equity returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: If the median 20-day return is negative following months when both proxies exceed their MAs, or if hit rate is below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in industrial production (INDPRO) exceeding 0.3% indicates accelerating manufacturing activity, which boosts corporate earnings expectations and produces positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If the average 20-day return following such triggers is negative, or if the frequency of positive returns is below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: When the year-over-year change in CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5%, it signals rising inflationary pressure that may compel the Fed to tighten policy earlier than expected, leading to negative short-term forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: If the following 5-day return is positive in more than 55% of triggered instances over any 1-year window.

mechanism_narrative: The level of real retail sales (RSAFS) provides a direct read of consumer spending, the main driver of US GDP; a high and rising level supports continued economic expansion and positive 5-day forward returns.
failure_condition: If the rank correlation between RSAFS level and subsequent 5-day returns is negative or insignificant (|IC|<0.03) over a rolling 2-year period.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production (INDPRO) falls below its 12-month moving average, it signals that the factory sector is contracting, which foreshadows weaker earnings and lower equity valuations over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: If the 60-day forward return is positive in more than 40% of the months when INDPRO is below its MA over any 3-year period.
